EIP-7730 clear-signing metadata: wallet can display human-readable token names      because token addresses appear directly in calldata rather than as numeric indices.      Three funding modes:      1. APPROVAL \u2014 user approves THIS contract for each input/LP token.      2. Native ETH \u2014 user sends msg.value when tokenIn is the pool's wrapper (or NATIVE sentinel).      3. Permit2 \u2014 user signs an EIP-712 witness; no Concierge allowance required (only Permit2).","kind":"dev","methods":{"burn(address,address,uint256,uint256,bool)":{"params":{"lpAmount":"LP token amount to burn","pool":"PartyPool to burn from","recipient":"Address that receives the basket tokens"}},"burnSwap(address,address,address,uint256,uint256,uint256,bool)":{"params":{"lpAmount":"LP token amount to burn","pool":"PartyPool to burn from","recipient":"Address that receives the output tokens","tokenOut":"Address of the token to receive, or NATIVE for ETH (forces unwrap)"}},"mint(address,address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"lpTokenAmount":"Desired LP token amount to mint","pool":"PartyPool to mint into","recipient":"Address that receives the LP tokens"}},"swap(address,address,address,address,uint256,uint256,uint256,bool)":{"params":{"pool":"PartyPool to trade in","recipient":"Address that receives the output tokens","tokenIn":"Address of the input token, or NATIVE for ETH","tokenOut":"Address of the output token, or NATIVE to receive ETH (forces unwrap)"}},"swapMint(address,address,address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"pool":"PartyPool to mint into","recipient":"Address that receives the LP tokens","tokenIn":"Address of the input token, or NATIVE for ETH"}},"swapPermit2(address,address,address,address,address,uint256,uint256,uint256,bool,uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"`tokenIn` must be a real ERC20 (Permit2 has no native path). `tokenOut` may be NATIVE."}},"title":"IPartyConcierge","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"NATIVE()":{"notice":"Sentinel for native chain currency (ETH). params.recipient: Address that receives the basket tokens
Address that receives the output tokens
params.tokenOut: Address of the token to receive, or NATIVE for ETH (forces unwrap)

params.lpTokenAmount: Desired LP token amount to mint
params.recipient: Address that receives the LP tokens
Address that receives the output tokens
params.tokenIn: Address of the input token, or NATIVE for ETH
params.tokenOut: Address of the output token, or NATIVE to receive ETH (forces unwrap)

params.recipient: Address that receives the LP tokens
params.tokenIn: Address of the input token, or NATIVE for ETH

swapPermit2(address,address,address,addr.details: `tokenIn` must be a real ERC20 (Permit2 has no native path). `tokenOut` may be NATIVE.

NATIVE().notice: Sentinel for native chain currency (ETH). When passed as `tokenIn` or `tokenOut`,         the Concierge substitutes the pool's wrapper token internally. EIP-7730 wallets         typically render this address as "ETH" in clear-signing.

PERMIT2().notice: The Permit2 contract used for SignatureTransfer-funded operations.

burn(address,address,uint256,uint256,boo.notice: Proportional burn: redeem LP tokens for the basket.         User must approve this contract for the pool's LP token.

burnSwap(address,address,address,uint256.notice: Single-token burn: redeem LP tokens for one output token.         User must approve this contract for the pool's LP token.

mint(address,address,uint256,uint256).notice: Proportional mint: deposit all basket tokens, receive LP tokens.         User must approve this contract for every token in the pool. If the wrapper         token is in the pool, msg.value can cover its required deposit (auto-wrapped).

planner().notice: The PartyPlanner used to resolve token indices and validate pool support.

swap(address,address,address,address,uin.notice: Swap tokenIn for tokenOut in pool. User must approve this contract for tokenIn         (or pass NATIVE + msg.value to pay with ETH).

swapMint(address,address,address,uint256.notice: Single-token mint: deposit one token, receive an exact LP amount.         User must approve this contract for tokenIn (or pass NATIVE + msg.value).

swapPermit2(address,address,address,addr.notice: Permit2-funded swap. Relayer (msg.sender) need not equal `payer`; the Permit2         signature authorizes the transfer. Witness is keyed on token *addresses* so         EIP-7730 wallets can clear-sign with readable token names.
